items.description: Add slashing integration to fuzz handler — simulate Vault.onSlash() calls during test sequences
items.rationale: Current handler tests allocation/deallocation but not slashing impact on share value

items.description: Add multi-user scenario support to handler — track per-user share balances
items.rationale: Current handler uses per-call users but doesn't track individual balances across sequences

items.description: Add forceDeallocate invariants — verify limits are correctly reduced after force deallocation
items.rationale: P-004 identified forceDeallocate limit reduction as a high-priority invariant

items.description: Add withdrawal queue invariant — verify pendingAssets consistency after sweep
items.rationale: P-019 withdrawal queue consistency after sweep is an important economic invariant

items.description: Deploy VetoSlasher harness for resolver timing edge case testing
items.rationale: VetoSlasher resolver timing (X-7, X-8) is a high-value attack surface

items.description: Build Rewards V2 snapshot distribution test harness
items.rationale: Rewards distribution integrity is a key economic invariant (E-6, P-015)

items.description: Add multi-adapter scenario with different deallocate behaviors
items.rationale: Real adapters have varying deallocate latency; testing with multiple adapters stresses sweepPending logic
Fee calculation rounding (P-012) could allow value extraction
